Source: https://www.umkc.edu/is/resources/lab-information/matlab-toolboxes.html

Matlab Toolboxes are collections of functions that extend the core functionality of Matlab. Each toolbox incorporates a different set of specialty functions that can be used within Matlab. Historically, each UMKC Department selected which toolboxes to license and offer within their units based on specific needs. The UMKC Campus Wide License for Matlab ensures that all UMKC students, faculty, and staff have access to the same extensive list of over 100+ toolboxes covering a wide range of disciplines and specialties. Students now have access to the full set of toolboxes within Matlab regardless of which IS Lab or Departmental Lab they are using. Faculty no longer need to request or purchase individual toolboxes. MathWork's
ver
function documentation
offers syntax and sample commands for displaying the entire list of installed toolboxes while using the Matlab application.
UMKC Toolbox List
Documentation and information regarding invidual toolboxes is available on the
MathWorks documentation website
.
